noticias.titulo: Vertex Signs Letter of Intent (LOI) with the pan-Canadian Pharmaceutical Alliance for ALYFTREK for the Treatment of Cystic Fibrosis
noticias.resumen: Vertex Pharmaceuticals today announced that it has signed a Letter of Intent (LOI) with the pan-Canadian Pharmaceutical Alliance (pCPA) for PrALYFTREK® (vanzacaftor/tezacaftor/deutivacaftor), a new triple combination therapy for the treatment of cystic fibrosis (CF) in patients aged 6 years and olde

noticias.titulo: CRISPR Therapeutics vs. Viking Therapeutics: Which Healthcare Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
noticias.resumen: One company leads in gene-editing approvals, while the other targets surging demand in metabolic treatments. Here’s how their financials and risk profiles compare.

noticias.titulo: While SpaceX Gets the Headlines, Smart Investors Are Loading Up on This Stock Instead
noticias.resumen: This big biotech stock doesn't get the hype that SpaceX does. But it could be the smarter bet right now.
